hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && [ ! -f .claude/settings.local.json ] && cp .claude/settings.local.json.example .claude/settings.local.json && echo '[harness] settings.local.json created from template — review and add personal overrides.' ; true
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && echo "[harness] branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'n/a') | uncommitted: $(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') file(s)"
